zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube於1095年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌拉 費艾-阿萊斯時，她的父親Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube20歲，母親Lucie de Beaune20歲。她和Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly至少有3個女兒。她去世於1145年之後在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube was born in 1095, in La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube, was 20 and her mother, Lucie de Beaune, was 20. She had at least 3 daughters with Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly. She died after 1145, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube est née en 1095, à La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lucie de Beaune, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly. Elle est décédée après 1145, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube 1095 in La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube 20 und ihre Mutter Lucie de Beaune 20. Sie hatte mit Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1145 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube è nata il nel 1095 nel La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lucie de Beaune, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly. Morì dopo il 1145, nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube(이)가 1095년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 라 퍼트e-알레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucie de Beaune(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube nasceu em 1095, em La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lucie de Beaune, tinha 20 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube родилась в 1095 г. в местности ла фиртe-алеи, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucie de Beaune, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Gauthier de Neublans Seigneur de Navilly. Она умерла после 1145 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de la Ferté-sur-Aube nació en 1095, en La Ferté-Alais, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jobert de la Ferté-sur-Aube vicomte de La Ferté-sur-Aube, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lucie de Beaune, tenía 20 años.
